summary: 85 Solutions Rollout verified. All backend API tests pass (30/30). Frontend UI testing verified 10+ solution pages with all required sections: Hero, What We Deliver (12 features), Feature Cards (3), Products We Offer (8 clickable cards), Brands (10), Inspirations gallery (5+ images with Design Ideas badge), FAQ (4), and CTA. Product card and brand navigation working. Static pages (lighting-automation, home-cinema) working without regression. Homepage loads correctly.

tests: 10 brands (Control4, Crestron, Lutron, Sonos, KEF, Hikvision, Samsung, KNX, Clipsal)
Hero with COMPLETE HOME INTEGRATION badge, Smart Home Automation title
Products We Offer: 8 cards (Lighting, Climate Control, Multi-Room Audio, Motorized Blinds, Voice Control, Home Network, Security, Energy Management)
Inspirations gallery: Design Ideas badge + Inspirations heading + 5 images
CTA: Get a Free Quote button
Voice platforms (Alexa, Google, Siri) in content
lighting-automation: SMART LIVING badge, centered hero - no regression
home-cinema: AFFORDABLE HOME ENTERTAINMENT badge, LIVING ROOM HOME THEATER title - no regression
Homepage loads with INTEGRATED LUXURY LIVING

critical_code_review_comments: SolutionClient.tsx properly implements Products We Offer section with image cards linking to /solutions/{slug}
Brands section correctly generates links to /brands/{brand-slug}
Inspirations section shows 'Design Ideas' badge and 'Inspirations' heading as required
page.tsx correctly builds productSolutions from related_products slugs
Static pages (SeoLandingPageTemplate) unaffected by dynamic page changes
context_for_next_testing_agent: 85 solutions rollout verified. Key sections on dynamic [slug] pages: Hero (category badge), What We Deliver (12 features), What You Get (3 feature cards - only for dynamic pages), Products We Offer (8 image cards linking to /solutions/{slug}), Brands We Integrate (10 cards linking to /brands/{slug}), Inspirations (gallery with Design Ideas badge), FAQ (4 Q&A), CTA. Static pages like /solutions/lighting-automation and /solutions/home-cinema use SeoLandingPageTemplate with different layout. Note: majlis-audio-experience exists but cultural-automation/majlis-automation is a nested route requiring special handling.
